scope: read-only oracle-context robustness comparison of score-only coordinate integrators on the failed seed-5601 EMA checkpoint

decision_rule.pass: a unique non-ancestral candidate passing every relative robustness check may enter a separately frozen free-generation diagnostic on the same checkpoint
decision_rule.fail: if no candidate passes, retain the production sampler and attribute H1a primarily to learned-field off-path robustness/capacity rather than finite analytic integration
decision_rule.boundary: This read-only audit cannot change weights, qualify H1a, or authorize H1b, tensor conditioning, oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
